text.title: Frontend Component Practices Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml for practices-frontend-components.

conclusion.verdict: uncontrolled: defaultValue + ref; no value prop
stateless presentational component; pure function of props
use the semantic element (button/a/input); only fall back to div+role if layout truly demands it

text.example: interactive=false → stateless presentational OrderRow with typed props, CSS modules, sibling test + story. Rule: one-responsibility.
